ggWebGL: WebGL Rendering Backend for ggplot2

Source: R/ggWebGL-package.R
ggWebGL-package.Rd

ggWebGL provides a browser-native WebGL path for a focused ggplot2 subset. The current package supports dense 2D point, line, trajectory, and raster rendering, fixed-scale faceting, htmlwidget export, Shiny output bindings, and optional static snapshot/export surfaces. Backend integrations must hand over normalized primitive-scene payloads through explicit adapter or bridge boundaries.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://fbertran.github.io/ggWebGL/

  • https://github.com/fbertran/ggWebGL

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/fbertran/ggWebGL/issues
